lab.quantum

The 3D Lab

An interactive WebGL particle universe powered by Three.js, GSAP, and your webcam.

QUANTUM MIRROR

A 10,000-point particle system that creates a live holographic mirror using your webcam and GPU computing.

All processing is local on your GPU. No video is recorded or transmitted.
PUSHKAR.
ONLINE // WEST_BENGAL
  • 00LIVE_MIRROR
  • 01GENESIS_DNA
  • 02NEURAL_SKILLS
  • 03PROJECT_MATRIX

QUANTUM REFLECTION

Real-time GPGPU Particle Processing

Try Moving Your Hands or Body.
10,000-point fluid simulation. Your camera feed is converted into 3D vectors via raycasting and brightness-depth mapping. Move your mouse to repel the particles!

IDENTITY.BIO

Technical Proficiency

Code Core: JavaScript, Node.js, Python, C.

Specialties: AI Automation, WebGL Particle Systems, Google APIs.

CONSTRUCTS

Deployed Architectures

[01] Dynamic Weather Dashboard

🖱️

Mouse Repulsion

Move your mouse inside the frame to repel the particles.

📷

Webcam Mirror

Activate webcam for a real-time holographic face mirror.

🧬

Morph Shapes

Switch between DNA, Neural Knot, and Matrix modes.

🎵

Audio Reactive

If mic is enabled, particles pulse to your voice and music.
